category_sources: Official GitHub README says toktop is a terminal dashboard for OpenAI and Anthropic token usage and costs.
source_facts.description says it is an LLM usage monitor in terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and ASCII title use toktop.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, hotkeys, and provider API key requirements.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/htin1/toktop; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README names OpenAI and Anthropic token usage and terminal dashboard functionality.
